name: Feeding Frenzy at the Marina
text: Each opponent flips a coin. Each creature you control gets +X/+0 until end of turn, where X is the number of coins flipped this way plus the number of dice and coins any player has rolled or flipped this turn. Then all your creatures with a sludge counter gain trample. Chum's in the water and the water answered.
flavorText: Boat Days festival, year forty. Attendance: thousands. Survivors: fewer.
